title: Opening reference documentation results in error
body:
Open https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/_static/api.html?version=v4.2 or any other version (propably) results in an error being displayed:

```Something went wrong...
Failed to load https://storage.googleapis.com/libpod-master-releases/swagger-v4.2.yaml: 403 Forbidden

Stack trace

u@https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/redoc@next/bundles/redoc.standalone.js:8:75657
4182/loadExternalRef/<@https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/redoc@next/bundles/redoc.standalone.js:8:76783
s@https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/redoc@next/bundles/redoc.standalone.js:8:74778

ReDoc Version: 2.0.0-rc.75
Commit: d7440fb```

comments.body: link works for me, maybe some temporary hiccup? Can you try again?
Hi @Luap99 I still get the same error.
What do you get when you `curl https://storage.googleapis.com/libpod-master-releases/swagger-v4.2.yaml`?
Interesting. I get the whole yaml content.

Are you logged into your google account? Maybe google is blocking for some reason.
https://cloud.google.com/storage/docs/xml-api/reference-status#403%E2%80%94forbidden
Closing as it seems a problem on your end
I can confirm it's working on my other device. Sorry for the inconvenience.
I logged out of my Google account and opened the page on a incognito window in Chrome. Still not working.
weird, do you have a proxy or VPN configured that could be blocked? Maybe try a different web browser.
It was the proxy thank your for your time :)
